---
title: "Vertical Equity for High and Low Values"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    fig-align: center
    fontsize: 12pt
---

This report looks at the top and bottom 5 percent of properties (grouped by township) and provide ratio stats as well as a map of their ratios.

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(dplyr)
library(ccao)
library(glue)
library(leaflet)
library(noctua)
library(plotly)
```


```{r}
noctua_options(cache_size = 10, unload = FALSE)

AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA <- dbConnect(noctua::athena(),
  rstudio_conn_tab = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
vertical_equity_data <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, glue::glue("
  SELECT loc_longitude,
         loc_latitude,
         run_id,
         sale_ratio_study_price,
         pred_pin_final_fmv_round,
         meta_township_code
  FROM model.assessment_pin
  WHERE run_id IN ('{params$run_id$run_id}', '{params$run_id$run_id_old}')
  "))

vertical_equity_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(sale_ratio_study_price), !is.na(pred_pin_final_fmv_round)) %>%
  group_by(run_id, meta_township_code) %>%
  mutate(
    price_group = case_when(
      sale_ratio_study_price <= quantile(sale_ratio_study_price, 0.05,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) ~ "Bottom 5%",
      sale_ratio_study_price >= quantile(sale_ratio_study_price, 0.95,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) ~ "Top 5%",
      TRUE ~ "Middle"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(price_group != "Middle") %>%
  group_by(run_id, price_group) %>%
  reframe(
    cod = ccao::ccao_cod(pred_pin_final_fmv_round / sale_ratio_study_price)$COD,
    prd = ccao::ccao_prd(pred_pin_final_fmv_round, sale_ratio_study_price)$PRD,
    prb = ccao::ccao_prb(pred_pin_final_fmv_round, sale_ratio_study_price)$PRB,
    n = n()
  ) %>%
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      order = list(list(0, "asc"), list(1, "asc"))
    ),
    rownames = FALSE,
    colnames = c(
      "Run ID" = "run_id",
      "Group" = "price_group",
      "COD" = "cod",
      "PRD" = "prd",
      "PRB" = "prb",
      "N" = "n"
    )
  ) %>%
  DT::formatRound(columns = c("COD", "PRD", "PRB"), digits = 3)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
# Prepare map data
map_data <- vertical_equity_data %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(sale_ratio_study_price),
    !is.na(loc_latitude),
    !is.na(loc_longitude)
  ) %>%
  group_by(run_id) %>%
  mutate(
    price_group = case_when(
      sale_ratio_study_price <= quantile(sale_ratio_study_price, 0.05,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) ~ "Bottom 5%",
      sale_ratio_study_price >= quantile(sale_ratio_study_price, 0.95,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ) ~ "Top 5%",
      TRUE ~ "Middle"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(price_group != "Middle") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    ratio = pred_pin_final_fmv_round / sale_ratio_study_price,
    ratio_clamped = pmin(pmax(ratio, 0.8), 1.2),
    marker_color = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#2166ac", "#f7f7f7", "#d6604d"),
      domain = c(0.8, 1.2)
    )(ratio_clamped)
  )

run_ids <- sort(unique(map_data$run_id))
run_old <- run_ids[1]
run_new <- run_ids[2]

make_map <- function(price_grp) {
  d_old <- map_data %>% filter(price_group == price_grp, run_id == run_old)
  d_new <- map_data %>% filter(price_group == price_grp, run_id == run_new)

  plot_ly() %>%
    add_trace(
      data = d_old,
      type = "scattermapbox",
      lat = ~loc_latitude,
      lon = ~loc_longitude,
      mode = "markers",
      marker = list(
        size = 8,
        color = ~marker_color,
        opacity = 0.8
      ),
      text = ~ paste0(
        "Run: ", run_id, "<br>",
        "Group: ", price_group, "<br>",
        "Predicted FMV: $",
        format(pred_pin_final_fmv_round, big.mark = ","), "<br>",
        "Sale Price: $",
        format(sale_ratio_study_price, big.mark = ","), "<br>",
        "Ratio: ", round(ratio, 3)
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text",
      name = run_old
    ) %>%
    add_trace(
      data = d_new,
      type = "scattermapbox",
      lat = ~loc_latitude,
      lon = ~loc_longitude,
      mode = "markers",
      marker = list(
        size = 8,
        color = ~marker_color,
        opacity = 0.8
      ),
      text = ~ paste0(
        "Run: ", run_id, "<br>",
        "Group: ", price_group, "<br>",
        "Predicted FMV: $", format(pred_pin_final_fmv_round,
          big.mark = ","
        ), "<br>",
        "Sale Price: $", format(sale_ratio_study_price,
          big.mark = ","
        ), "<br>",
        "Ratio: ", round(ratio, 3)
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text",
      name = run_new
    ) %>%
    add_trace(
      type = "scattermapbox",
      lat = list(mean(map_data$loc_latitude, na.rm = TRUE)),
      lon = list(mean(map_data$loc_longitude, na.rm = TRUE)),
      mode = "markers",
      marker = list(
        size = 0,
        color = list(0.8, 1.2),
        colorscale = list(
          c(0, "#2166ac"),
          c(0.5, "#f7f7f7"),
          c(1, "#d6604d")
        ),
        cmin = 0.8,
        cmax = 1.2,
        showscale = TRUE,
        colorbar = list(title = "Pred / Sale Price")
      ),
      hoverinfo = "skip",
      showlegend = FALSE
    ) %>%
    layout(
      mapbox = list(
        style = "open-street-map",
        zoom = 9,
        center = list(
          lat = mean(map_data$loc_latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
          lon = mean(map_data$loc_longitude, na.rm = TRUE)
        )
      ),
      legend = list(
        title = list(text = "<b>Run ID</b>"),
        orientation = "h",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.05
      ),
      title = price_grp,
      margin = list(t = 40)
    )
}

map_bottom <- make_map("Bottom 5%")
map_top <- make_map("Top 5%")
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Bottom 5%
```{r echo=FALSE}
map_bottom
```

## Top 5%
```{r echo=FALSE}
map_top
```

:::

## Top 5%
```{r echo=FALSE}
map_top
```

:::

## Top 5%
```{r echo=FALSE}
map_top
```

:::
